title: ice40: BRAM is replaced with DFFs even when conditionally assigned read buffer is exhaustive

features.name: bram inference with exhaustive conditional assignment
features.description: Code should include a BRAM inference pattern where the output buffer register is assigned via an exhaustive if-else chain where all branches assign a value

features.name: nested if-else with default assignment for ram_read
features.description: Code should include nested if-else statements with a default else clause assigning to ram_read, ensuring all code paths assign a value
